twitter_thread: Tested 27 AI accounting tools, 23 were just QuickBooks with a chatbot. The 4 that worked:
CapCut's AI content creation is limited to 10-minute videos, but its auto-editing saves 2 hours/day
Integrated Xero with 5 AI tools, saw 30% reduction in accounting errors and 25% faster reconciliations
Avoid AI marketing tools promising 1000% ROI, focus on ones like Mailchimp that automate workflows
Combined human creativity with AI optimization, saw 40% increase in marketing engagement
Currently testing 12 AI tools for accounting and marketing, looking for 20% efficiency gains
What AI tool has saved you the most time or money in your business, and how much? #aibusiness #aiaccounting
pack.linkedin: After testing 27 AI accounting tools, I found that 23 were just reskinned versions of QuickBooks with a chatbot added on. However, integrating Xero with 5 AI tools resulted in a 30% reduction in accounting errors and 25% faster reconciliations. CapCut's AI content creation capabilities also saved 2 hours/day in video editing. What specific AI tools have driven tangible results in your business, and how did you measure their impact?
